_note: A diagnostic to the RIGHT of an in-line overlay rewrite on the same line must keep its exact source column. Here the untyped `createEventDispatcher()` call gains a `<__SvnCustomEvents<$$Events>>` type argument in the overlay (fires when `interface $$Events` is declared), shifting every later byte on the line; the TS2322 on `bad` still maps to the pre-shift column because the script-body splice records longest-common-prefix/suffix token-map entries, so byte-identical regions around an in-line rewrite keep exact column mapping instead of falling back to the line map's column passthrough.
